title: Bilibili Gaming parts ways with head coach Muggle
description: BLG and Muggle go separate ways.
author: raezeri

title: How FrosT and a re-tooled roster made Global truly global
description: At the end of 2023, FrosT thought his time in Valorant was over. In 2026, he led Global Esports to the team's first-ever international tournament on his second try.
author: weivy

title: Wolves allow SiuFatBB to explore options
description: One year after becoming the Cinderellas of Toronto, Wolves and SiuFatBB are going in different directions.
author: jenopelle

title: Your Favorite Thieves: 100T and YFP forge new partnership
description: A new partnership will see Your Favorite Players become Your Favorite Thieves.
author: jenopelle

title: Hot off the press: Cloud9 signs FireBallOps
description: Cloud9's starting five is complete with its latest, hottest new signing.
author: jenopelle

title: 5 years and 127 days: Xeppaa leaves Cloud9
description: After over five years as a mainstay in the C9Val lineup, Xeppaa is out.
author: jenopelle

title: FNATIC welcomes ENGH as new head coach
description: The former KC, TSM, and GMB head coach will now lead one of European Valorant's most decorated outfits.
author: jenopelle

title: Studio Stage and weekend matches to arrive in EMEA Stage 2
description: Riot's latest change to the VCT EMEA will allow for more flexible broadcasted matches.
author: ChickenJoe

title: KRÜ parts ways with silentzz
description: Just minutes after the team's elimination from the EWC Qualifiers, silentzz is out at KRÜ.
author: jenopelle

title: Three first-time matchups drawn to open Masters London
description: The opening matchups for the Masters London Swiss Stage have been drawn.
author: jenopelle

title: 2026 VCT Americas Stage 2 groups drawn
description: The groups have been shuffled, and the road to São Paulo has been set.
author: jenopelle

title: Back to the top: G2 prevails over LEVIATÁN  to reclaim Americas crown
description: The dynasty prevails, shutting down a budding superteam to claim its fourth regional title in the last two years.
author: jenopelle

title: G2 takes down NRG 3-2 to earn grand final spot
description: G2 will take on LEVIATÁN tomorrow in hopes of reclaiming the Americas crown.
author: raezeri

title: LEVIATÁN reaches finals, NRG secures London slot
description: LEV defeated G2 Esports in three maps to reach the VCT 2026 Americas Stage 1 finals, while NRG eliminated 100 Thieves in a sweep to secure the final slot at Masters London.
author: weivy

title: Azure Dragon revamps ahead of Stage 3 with stacked roster
description: Azure has reloaded ahead of Stage 3, with an Americas Play-In spot on the line.
author: jenopelle
